feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.nodeWind: Number of recent gathering nodes used for rolling XP, timing, item, and LE rates. Minimum: 1.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.material: WynnVentory price used to calculate LE per hour. Defaults to the lowest current listing price.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showProf: Show the active profession and its level.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showBomb: Show active Profession XP and Profession Speed bombs in the header.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showXpPe: Show the rolling average XP gained per gathering node.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showSeco: Show the rolling average time between gathering nodes.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showOneS: Show the estimated hourly rate of one-star materials.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showTwoS: Show the estimated hourly rate of two-star materials.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showThre: Show the estimated hourly rate of three-star materials.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showLePe: Show the Trade Market value per hour when WynnVentory is installed.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showXpUn: Show the profession XP remaining before the next level.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showTime: Show the estimated gathering time remaining before the next level.
feature.wynntils.gatheringStats.showNode: Show the estimated gathering nodes remaining before the next level.
